panels.description: openwebui_redis_up: 1 = Redis reachable, 0 = down or REDIS_URL not set.
panels.title: Redis up

panels.description: Horizontal bands and lines at 0.5s, 1s, 2s. Edit panel → Field → Thresholds to match your SLO.
panels.title: P99 latency (global)

panels.description: 1 = Redis reachable, 0 = down or not configured (matches openwebui_redis_up in code).
panels.title: Redis availability (timeseries)

panels.description: Standard Python GC metrics when exported by the Prometheus client. Generation labels: 0 = short-lived, 1 = medium, 2 = long-lived.
panels.title: GC objects collected / s

panels.description: Non-zero can indicate uncollectable cycles (investigate further).
panels.title: GC objects uncollectable (total)

panels.description: GC runs per second by generation.
panels.title: GC collections / s

list.description: Use custom_openwebui if your scrape config rewrites metric names (as in some setups).
list.label: HTTP metric prefix
list.name: http_prefix
